chunks.page_summary: This page details the variable dimensions for the Rheonics SRV flange, including insertion lengths, flange specifications, and critical dimensions, alongside company contact and legal information.
chunks.extracted_text:
Variable dimensions:
A: Insertion length
Standard insertion length is 79.7 mm
Custom lengths are possible from 45.7mm<A<79.7mm

B: Flange/adapter:
Specify the norm, size, pressure rating, e.g.
ANSI 150 LB RF 2 inch
ANSI 300 LB RF 1.5 inch

Units: mm [inch]

key_facts: The SRV flange has a standard insertion length of 79.7 mm.
Custom insertion lengths for the SRV flange are available, ranging from 45.7 mm to just under 79.7 mm.
Flange specifications, including norm, size, and pressure rating, must be provided for the 'B' dimension.
The document specifies dimensions in both millimeters and inches.
Rheonics offers inline process density and viscosity monitoring solutions.
